name: Eureka II
description: Experience the thrill of speed sailing aboard Eureka II, a standout vessel in the Whitsundays known for its fast and smooth journey across the waters. Perfect for couples and adventure seekers, this tour offers a unique hands-on sailing experience on a real race boat. With spacious interiors and modern comforts, guests can enjoy freshly prepared meals, private cabins, and the opportunity to snorkel in the pristine waters of the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park. Ideal for those looking to combine adventure with relaxation in a small group setting.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina, Airlie Beach - North End
departure_times: Departs 2:00pm Mon, Thu | Returns 4:00pm Wed, Sat
includes:
Snorkel the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park
Snorkelling equipment provided
Fresh, clean linen provided
Freshly-made meals prepared by a professional crew
Private cabins and shared accommodation
Marine Park fees
highlights:
Slightly longer experience than most 2 night sailing tours
Ideal for couples and travellers seeking small group sailing
Unique Ocean Racer design for a smooth journey
Fast, smooth sailing experience
Hands-on sailing experience
Visit to Whitehaven Beach
Access to remote and off the beaten track locations
Authentic sailing on a Grand Prix racing circuit boat
price_tiers: Shared Accommodation (Apr 2025 - Sep 2026): A$669 | Private Double Cabin (Apr 2025 - Sep 2026, for 2 people): A$789
ideal_for: Couples, adventure seekers, and those interested in hands-on sailing experiences
